title: Stick Together, Lyrical Tradition Dance Club
overview: Mana’s first day at Marehoshi Academy comes with an unexpected discovery. It turns out club participation is mandatory, so it’s time to find one, and fast!

title: Nothing More Than a Water Flea
overview: If the club doesn’t get five members, it’ll be disbanded. Scrambling for ideas, Sayu suggests attracting new members with a mini live show. And what about Kae — will she join?

title: Didn't I Say I'm Not Interested?
overview: Kasumi's aptitude for stardom makes her a potential recruit. But she isn't interested in joining and challenges the club to a survival game! Can the club change her mind?

title: It's Over for Mii
overview: The student council can’t disband the club now that it has five members! That is until the vice president moves the goalposts. What does she have against the club, anyway?

title: Umekobucha Drinking Party
overview: The club needs a song, fast! With the submission deadline quickly approaching, everyone pairs up to brainstorm ideas. Hopefully, they won’t get too carried away...

title: Yukari-chan is My Aunt
overview: Minori is all work and no play when it comes to practice, but the rest of KiRaRe really need a break. Surely there’s more to being an idol than rehearsal and costumes, right?

title: She is My Senpai, But Maybe I Should Shut Her Up
overview: A chance meeting with Aone of Stella Maris shakes Mana to her core as bad memories come flooding back. If Mana’s so talented, what’s holding her back?

title: I Won´t Do It For Free
overview: KiRaRe did well, but they’re not the only competitors on stage! Stella Maris and ortensia are performing, too, and they'll give KiRaRe a run for their money.

title: I'll Go Ahead and Contact Her Parents
overview: Sayu’s distracted during practice and confides to Mana that she’s having trouble at home. Her mom doesn’t want her to become an idol!

title: Their Power Levels are rapidly increasing
overview: Stella Mars is amazingly good, so KiRaRe decides to sneak onto the main campus for a little reconnaissance. However, the idol group Tetrarkhia has the same idea!

title: A Bad Poem Is A Bad Poem
overview: The computer crunched the numbers and KiRaRe’s chances of beating Stella Maris are… 0%????? No way, that can’t possibly be right!

title: This is Our...
overview: The finals are finally here!  Stella Maris may be a tough act to follow but no matter what happens, the members of KiRaRe will always have each other.
